meaning: n.[化]类低共熔体adj.类低共熔体的,共析的
examples: Pearlitic transformation in steel is a typical diffusion eutectoid transition.
Both steel iron and cast iron have the structures of eutectoid, hypoeutectoid and hypereutectoid.
Steels having less than the eutectoid amount of carbon (less than 0.77%) are known as hypo-eutectoid steels.
